sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ChartWatch ASX Scans: CSL, Cochlear, Resmed, IDP Education, Harvey Norman, Nick Scali, Judo Capital, Global X Hydrogen ETF
feed.summary: This ChartWatch ASX Scans article identifies key uptrends and downtrends on the ASX using a trend-following technical analysis methodology. Editor Carl Capolingua highlights stocks like Altair Minerals and Global X Hydrogen ETF in uptrends, while CSL, Cochlear, and Resmed are noted in significant downtrends. The article emphasizes that it is not a recommendation service but an aid for investors to conduct their own research based on trend analysis.

feed.title: Jacobs lands 8-year role on U.K. projects tied to a low-carbon grid
feed.summary: Jacobs (NYSE: J) has secured an eight-year multi-disciplinary framework agreement with Murphy to support projects within its SSEN Transmission portfolio in the U.K. This collaboration will focus on transmission and distribution infrastructure development to advance the U.K.'s low-carbon future. Jacobs will provide integrated engineering, environmental, and civil services, building on previous successful projects like the Uxbridge Moor substation.

feed.title: Rothschild Redburn upgrades McDonald’s stock rating on value reset By Investing.com
feed.summary: Rothschild Redburn has upgraded McDonald’s Corp. (NYSE:MCD) from Sell to Neutral and increased its price target to $306 from $260, citing a successful "value reset" that has addressed previous concerns about price-led growth and weak traffic. The firm noted a return to growth in U.S. traffic and positive two-year stacked same-store sales trends. While GLP-1 remains a potential risk, its impact is currently limited among lower-income households due to cost.

feed.title: Coca Cola Tests App Based Airport Experience To Deepen Investor Story
feed.summary: Coca-Cola India has launched a new app-based experiential engagement at Bengaluru International Airport, aiming to connect with travelers and further its digital engagement strategy. This initiative allows Coca-Cola to gather data on traveler behavior, test app-based offers, and refine its interaction with higher-income and frequent travelers, serving as a real-world lab for app integration and cross-selling. Investors should monitor whether this model is replicated in other travel hubs and how it contributes to the company's long-term digital and travel-related initiatives.

feed.title: Innate Pharma to Participate in the D. Boral Capital Global Conference
feed.summary: Innate Pharma SA, a clinical-stage biotechnology company, announced that members of its executive team will attend the D. Boral Capital Global Conference in New York on May 7, 2026, for one-on-one investor meetings. The company is developing immunotherapies for cancer patients, leveraging antibody-engineering and innovative target identification to advance a portfolio of differentiated assets. Innate Pharma has collaborations with leading biopharmaceutical companies like Sanofi and AstraZeneca.

feed.title: Seattle could lose hundreds of millions in tax revenue as Starbucks expands in Tennessee
feed.summary: This article discusses the potential financial impact on Seattle as Starbucks expands its operations in Tennessee. The move highlights the ongoing trend of companies relocating or expanding in states with more favorable tax environments.
